import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_find_first_in_sorted_basic():
    """Test basic functionality of find_first_in_sorted."""
    # Example from docstring
    assert source.find_first_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 5, 6], 5) == 2
    # Single element
    assert source.find_first_in_sorted([1], 1) == 0
    # Not found
    assert source.find_first_in_sorted([1, 2, 3], 4) == -1
